title: trifolium polymorphum var. polymorphum
intro: Trifolium polymorphum var. polymorphum, also known as the 'Alpine Clover', is a perennial herb belonging to the legume family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial activities. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as aiding digestion, reducing fever, and promoting wound healing. Trifolium polymorphum var. polymorphum can be prepared in different herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
